Enumeration Case# kIOVideoFeatureControlClassIDOpticalFilter

macOS 10.12+

```
kIOVideoFeatureControlClassIDOpticalFilter = 'opft'
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/kernel/1646200-anonymous/kiovideofeaturecontrolclassidopticalfilter#discussion)

A IOVideoFeatureControl that controls chagning the optical filter of camera lens function. The units for the control's absolute value are are undefined.
